items.title: WhatsApp head Will Cathcart is stepping down after seven years
items.summary: Will Cathcart, who led WhatsApp for the past seven years, is stepping down from his role as Meta appoints a new leader. On Monday, Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg announced on Facebook...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Instagram looks to take on streaming services with longer-form, episodic and live formats for its TV app
items.summary: Instagram is coming for streaming services like Netflix and Amazon Prime Video as it sets its ambitions for living room viewing.
